entries.title: Equity Research, Intern
entries.description: From drafting sector reports to initiating coverage on IDX-listed companies, I learned that good research is equal parts rigorous analysis and clear storytelling. I also integrated Python into our workflow to automate data retrieval, bridging the gap between financial insight and technical efficiency.

entries.title: Teaching Assistant
entries.description: Standing on the other side of the classroom changed how I think about knowledge. Guiding students through business process frameworks and weekly tutorials sharpened my ability to break down complexity and communicate it clearly, a skill I carry into every professional setting.

entries.title: Finance Lead
entries.description: I work in a fast-moving environment where decisions carry direct consequences. Building the venture has taught me how financial structure, governance, and disciplined judgment turn ideas into systems that sustain growth over time.

entries.title: Equity Research, Intern
entries.description: I had the opportunity to dive into financials and market signals of IDX-listed firms, I uncovered patterns, valued stocks with DCF and comps, and crafted research that empowered management to act decisively in fast-moving market conditions.

entries.title: Head of Business Plan
entries.description: While engineers built the car, I built the story behind it—researching markets, modeling finances, and shaping a business plan that made our race car more than fast, but also financially and strategically driven.
